posts.author: rkntan.dev (rkntan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The AI notetaker joins meetings and generates summaries automatically. Currently, once these meeting logs are created, there is no option to delete them from the system.

What are you trying to achieve

This feature is necessary to allow users to permanently remove their data.
